data.title: BitMart launches Lagrange (LA)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Lagrange (LA) at 20:00 (Eastern Time) on June 4, and the LA/USDT trading pair will be launched.
Lagrange has built two core products: a decentralized zero-knowledge prover network (ZK Prover Network) and a zero-knowledge coprocessor (ZK Coprocessor). Lagrange's zero-knowledge prover network is the base layer, providing general proof generation capabilities for various use cases such as rollups, zero-knowledge coprocessing, and cross-chain messaging. The zero-knowledge coprocessor enables developers to prove custom SQL queries on on-chain data directly from smart contracts.

data.title: Base Network Achieves Record Daily Active Addresses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Nansen reveals that the Base Network has surpassed 3 million daily active addresses, reaching a new peak of 3,175,168. This marks a significant milestone for the network.

data.title: ETH/BTC Exchange Rate Rises, Indicating Strong Demand for Ethereum
data.description:
According to Odaily, the ETH/BTC exchange rate has seen a significant increase, rising by 30% over the past month. This trend suggests a stronger demand for Ethereum, with analysts indicating that the ETH/BTC rate breaking through a cup-and-handle pattern could signal the start of a new 'altcoin season.'

In parallel, the U.S. spot Ethereum ETF has recorded net inflows for 12 consecutive days, highlighting growing institutional interest in ETH. In contrast, the spot Bitcoin ETF experienced three consecutive days of outflows from May 29 to June 2, totaling $1.23 billion.

data.title: Hyperscale Data: 17.4 BTC mined in May, and about 90 BTC mined so far this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hyperscale Data, a New York Stock Exchange-listed company, disclosed that its wholly-owned subsidiary Sentinum mined 17.4 BTC in May, which is equivalent to about 1.9 million US dollars based on the number of bitcoins obtained on that day and the value of bitcoins on that day; about 90 BTC have been mined so far this year, which is about 8.7 million US dollars. In addition, Sentinum plans to expand its operation scale to about 3,200 Antminers in July. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Tether Expands in Latin America, Invests in Chilean Crypto Exchange: Explore Best Crypto to Buy!
data.description:
Tether has invested in a Chilean crypto exchange in a bid to expand to Latin America’s $415 billion cryptocurrency market. According to Chainalysis, LATAM received nearly $415 billion in cryptocurrency between July 2023 and June 2024, with stablecoins accounting for the majority of indirect flows from local to global exchanges, particularly in countries like Brazil and.
source: https://99bitcoins.com/news/tether-expands-in-latin-america-invests-in-chilean-crypto-exchange-explore-best-crypto-to-buy/

data.title: BTC’s Google search trends have dropped sharply, with retail investors showing little interest and speculation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BTC's Google search trends have fallen sharply, and the search ranking has dropped below 25, indicating a clear lack of interest, market excitement or speculative desire among retail investors in the market. Over the past month, the price of Bitcoin has hovered between $102,000 and $110,000 for most of the time. Analysts believe that this low interest coincides with historically low volatility. The Bitcoin Volatility Index (DVOL) is currently hovering above 40, one of the lowest values ​​in more than two years, second only to the low in mid-2023. (CoinDesk)

data.title: MoonPay has obtained the New York Bitcoin license BitLicense
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett posted on the X platform that MoonPay has obtained the New York Bitcoin license BitLicense, paving the way for the company to provide services to customers in all 50 states in the United States. It is reported that the few companies that have obtained this license currently include Anchorage Digital, Coinbase and Circle.

data.title: James Wynn: Bitcoin is king, don’t trust others who tell you not to buy it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Wynn, the whale, posted on the X platform that when someone tells you not to buy Bitcoin, they are secretly buying it. Due to several ETH inflows from BlackRock, ordinary people are fooled. Bitcoin is the king.

data.title: Bitcoin's Dominance Highlighted Amid Market Movements
data.description: According to Odaily, prominent investor James Wynn expressed on the X platform that while some advise against purchasing Bitcoin, they are secretly acquiring it themselves. He noted that due to several Ethereum inflows by BlackRock, the general public is being misled, emphasizing Bitcoin's supremacy in the market.

data.title: CME Reports Significant Growth in Cryptocurrency Futures Trading
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) has released data for May, highlighting a notable increase in futures contract trading volumes. The platform recorded an average daily trading volume of 28.9 million contracts, with cryptocurrency contracts experiencing a 145% rise in daily trading volume.

Ethereum futures contracts saw an average daily trading volume of 17,000 contracts. Additionally, micro Ethereum futures contracts experienced a 235% increase, reaching an average daily trading volume of 92,000 contracts. Micro Bitcoin futures contracts also grew by 95%, with an average daily trading volume of 65,000 contracts.

data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Labor Department is set to announce the May ADP employment figures, also known as the small non-farm payroll data, tonight at 20:15 UTC+8.

data.title: Wu Jiezhuang: Willing to provide assistance to Singapore virtual asset companies interested in entering Hong Kong
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong Legislative Council member Wu Jiezhuang posted on X, "Singapore earlier issued the Guidelines on Licensing for Digital Token Service Providers, which proposed new policies for companies, institutions, and personnel engaged in virtual assets. Since Hong Kong issued the Virtual Asset Declaration in 2022, it has actively welcomed the industry to develop in Hong Kong. According to informal statistics, thousands of Web3 companies have landed in Hong Kong. If you are currently engaged in a related industry in Singapore and are interested in moving your headquarters and personnel to Hong Kong, I am willing to provide assistance and welcome you to develop in Hong Kong!"

data.title: Hong Kong Legislator Encourages Web3 Companies to Relocate from Singapore
data.description: According to Odaily, Hong Kong Legislative Council member Ng Kit Chuang recently expressed on X that Singapore has introduced new policies for digital token service providers through its 'Guidelines on Licensing for Digital Token Service Providers.' These guidelines impose new regulations on companies, institutions, and individuals involved in virtual assets. Since Hong Kong's declaration on virtual assets in 2022, the region has actively welcomed the industry's development. Informal statistics indicate that over a thousand Web3 companies have established themselves in Hong Kong. Ng Kit Chuang extended an invitation to those currently operating in Singapore to consider relocating their headquarters and personnel to Hong Kong, offering assistance to facilitate their transition.
